title: The Aloha Shirt Revival: From Vacation Staple to Retail Core
excerpt: The Aloha shirt remains the anchor of many resort collections because it is recognizable, printable, and easy to expand into matching programs.
author: Aloha and Co

sections.title: A Category Anchor
paragraphs: The Aloha shirt continues to work because customers understand it quickly. For a new brand, that makes it a strong anchor SKU: easy to photograph, easy to merchandise, and easy to extend into shorts, dresses, kids styles, or accessories.

sections.title: Modern Fit and Fabric
paragraphs: Modern resort buyers expect more than a tourist-shop silhouette. Better fabrics, cleaner collar construction, balanced print scale, and refined fit all help the shirt move from novelty to repeatable retail product.

sections.title: The Custom Print Advantage
paragraphs: A strong custom print can make a familiar silhouette feel proprietary. That is why print development, color matching, and scale control are central to the product brief.
